allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=data[0] if data else {}; print\(list\(t.keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=data[0] if data else {}; print\(''''Keys:'''', list\(t.keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''C:/Temp/students_test.json''\); const problems=d.filter\(s=>s.plans&&s.plans.some\(p=>/^\\d+$/.test\(p\)\)\); console.log\(''Alunos com ID numerico no plano ainda:'', problems.length\); d.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(s=>console.log\(s.name,''| plan:'', s.plan,''| plans:'', JSON.stringify\(s.plans\),''| modalities:'', JSON.stringify\(s.modalities\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(process.env.TEMP+''/students_test.json''\); const problems=d.filter\(s=>s.plans&&s.plans.some\(p=>/^\\d+$/.test\(p\)\)\); console.log\(''IDs numericos restantes:'', problems.length\); d.slice\(0,6\).forEach\(s=>console.log\(s.name,''|'',s.plan,''|'',JSON.stringify\(s.plans\)\)\);")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); problems=[s for s in d if any\(p.isdigit\(\) for p in \(s.get\(''''plans''''\) or []\)\)]; print\(''''IDs numericos restantes:'''',len\(problems\)\); [print\(s[''''name''''],''''|'''',s.get\(''''plan''''\),''''|'''',s.get\(''''plans''''\)\) for s in d[:6]]")
